_comment: Per-instance HealthSpan skill config. One template, one file per person. NEVER commit a filled copy — it carries a credential. Owner (PC) sees managed profiles; others are RLS-scoped to themselves.
_is_minor_note: true for a minor (e.g. Dea). Minor-safety also lives in the context MD; this is defence-in-depth for the safety gate. The skill treats the profile as a minor if EITHER this OR the context MD's is_minor is true.
_context_note: targets/norms/voice/safety come from context/<display_name lowercased>.context.md (or set context_slug). The skill reads ALL targets from there, never a default.
_auth_user_id_note: auth_user_id below must be a family_memberships.auth_user_id for this profile (is_maintainer() and has_profile_access() resolve through family_memberships, NOT profiles.auth_user_id — a profile may have several memberships).
_access_model: A — per-person Supabase auth user + RLS (has_profile_access) + restricted grants (no DELETE/TRUNCATE; catalogs SELECT-only). Two connection modes supported; pick per instance:

supabase_client._use_for: Dea / mobile / web / Telegram (no localhost, no Postgres credential on device)
supabase_client.supabase_anon_key: <publishable anon key — useless alone, RLS denies everything without a session>
supabase_client.auth_password: <this person's Supabase auth password — REQUIRED for App mode>
supabase_client.auth_note: get_app_connection() signs in HERE with auth_email + auth_password; the client then carries the person's JWT (auth.uid()) → RLS scopes automatically. The caller does nothing extra. Missing auth_password errors out rather than falling through to an anon client (which RLS denies, 42501).

direct_role._use_for: PC / local (matches current lib/db.py psycopg2 path)
direct_role.jwt_claim_note: skill MUST run set_config('request.jwt.claims', '{"sub":"<auth_user_id>","role":"authenticated"}', false) at session start so has_profile_access() resolves — RLS as defence in depth

whoop._token_note: per-profile refresh token lives server-side (Supabase Edge whoop_tokens, PROMPT 12) once built; offline scope required
